standard.overall: A lithe, muscular cat with a ticked tabby coat and alert, regal appearance.
standard.head: Modified wedge with gently rounded contours; no flat planes.
standard.eyes: Almond-shaped, large, brilliant and expressive. Gold or green.
standard.ears: Large, alert, moderately pointed, broad at base.
standard.body: Medium long, lithe and graceful but showing well-developed muscular strength.
standard.coat: Soft, silky, fine in texture, but dense and resilient to the touch.
standard.personality: Extremely intelligent, active, and people-oriented. 'Busy' cats.

standard.overall: A true breed of working cat, strong, healthy, and symmetrical.
standard.head: Large, with a slightly longer face than wide. Square muzzle.
standard.eyes: Large and wide with the upper lid shaped like half an almond.
standard.ears: Medium size, slightly rounded at tips, set wide.
standard.body: Solidly built, powerful, muscular, well-developed shoulders and chest.
standard.coat: Short, thick, even and hard in texture.
standard.personality: Gentle, easy-going, and good with children and dogs.

standard.overall: A medium-sized cat with a rounded head and distinct folded ears.
standard.head: Well-rounded with a firm chin and jaw. Muzzle has well-rounded whisker pads.
standard.eyes: Large, round, with a sweet expression. Separated by a broad nose.
standard.ears: Fold forward and downward. Small, tightly folded preferred.
standard.body: Medium, rounded, even from shoulder to pelvic girdle.
standard.coat: Short, dense, resilient. Also longhair (Highland Fold) variety.
standard.personality: Sweet-tempered, quiet, and devoted to their owners.

standard.overall: The hairless cat. Distinctive for its lack of coat and wrinkled skin.
standard.head: Modified wedge, slightly longer than wide. Prominent cheekbones.
standard.eyes: Large, lemon-shaped, set at a slight upward slant.
standard.ears: Very large, broad at base, open and upright.
standard.body: Medium-sized, hard and muscular with a rounded 'pot-belly'.
standard.coat: Appears hairless. May be covered with soft fine down (suede-like).
standard.personality: Highly energetic, acrobatic, and very affectionate.

standard.overall: An elegant, sleek cat with striking color points and deep blue eyes.
standard.head: Long tapering wedge. Total absence of 'stop' or 'break' at eyes.
standard.eyes: Almond-shaped, slanted towards the nose. Vivid blue.
standard.ears: Strikingly large, pointed, wide at base.
standard.body: Medium-sized, graceful, long and slender. Tubular.
standard.coat: Short, fine, lying close to body.
standard.personality: Very vocal, intelligent, and highly social.

standard.overall: A medium to large cat with a wild, forest-cat appearance.
standard.head: Broad modified wedge with rounded contours. Small ears.
standard.eyes: Large, oval, set wide apart. Green, gold, or aqua.
standard.ears: Medium to small, relatively short, with a wide base.
standard.body: Long and substantial, very muscular. Robust bone.
standard.coat: Short to medium, dense, luxurious and unusually soft.
standard.personality: Active, confident, and curious. Enjoys climbing and water.
